scope: Semantic field transition — actors render as fields, not cards; per-mode atmospheric signatures; mode-reactive interpretation; monumental BOARDROOM ring

checks.name: semantic_field_transition_realized
checks.description: The .actor shared shell lost its border, background, and border-radius. Actors are now zones inside an atmospheric field, identifiable by top resonance lines and tags rather than enclosing rectangles.
checks.notes: Visible across all four lens captures. Resolution Boundary cells, Topology cells, Signal Stack rows all dissolved their per-cell borders.

checks.name: dashboard_regression_absent
checks.description: Zero regular grids of identical-width components on the primary surface. No KPI tiles. No charts. No filter rows. No tab strips.
checks.notes: Verified per lens. Resolution / Topology / Signal compositions use rails + glow dots, not enclosing tiles.

checks.name: boxed_panel_dominance_reduced
checks.description: .actor border and background removed; cells/rows use rails and gradient backing instead of full enclosing rectangles.
checks.notes: CSS verified — `.actor { background: transparent; border: none; }` and `.actor::before` thin top resonance line only. Resolution cells / Topology cells / Signal rows all use rails not borders.

checks.name: balanced_mode_semantically_densified
checks.description: BALANCED field carries Decision Posture + Resolution Boundary 3-zone + Confidence Boundary bar + single Pressure Anchor — no longer empty, no longer boxed.
checks.notes: Field gradient (state-color upper-left, warm lower-right, blue bottom) provides the confidence-landscape backing. Four semantic actors compose the field.

checks.name: dense_mode_topology_multidimensional
checks.description: DENSE field encodes three pressure-tier glow centers in the gradient signature (HIGH upper-left, ELEVATED center, MODERATE lower-right) — same evidence ground, three encoded centers, no linear chain.
checks.notes: Field gradient verified in CSS. Topology cells dissolve into the gradient. Cluster Concentration headline + Absorption Load left-rail panel preserved.

checks.name: investigation_mode_forensicized
checks.description: INVESTIGATION field is a vertical blue→yellow corridor with descending lineage chain, individual signal rows with tier rails and between-row resonance, and Inference Prohibition with governance contour extending behind the statement.
checks.notes: Mode-reactive 'FORENSIC INTERPRETATION' label with yellow accent. Inference Prohibition `::after` governance contour adds atmospheric rule-presence.

checks.name: boardroom_mode_projectionized
checks.description: BOARDROOM ring grew from 220px to 320px with 168px inner ring + 22px mask + outer ring at -36px + far outer dashed ring at -88px. Center label grew from 36px to 48px. Single state-color radial field gradient.
checks.notes: CSS verified. Visual register confirmed projection-grade ceremony in boardroom_1440x900_viewport.png capture.

checks.name: left_interpretation_mode_reactive
checks.description: Executive Interpretation column now adapts label, tone, section labels, and accent color per active lens via INTERP_MODE_FRAMING + data-tone attribute styling.
checks.notes: Four distinct framings: EXECUTIVE / STRUCTURAL / FORENSIC / PROJECTION. Tonal accent colors per mode. Section labels reframed per cognition register.

checks.name: semantic_spatial_composition_present
checks.description: Visual elements compose as fields, zones, sub-zones, glow dots, resonance lines, field rails, atmospheric rings — per `SEMANTIC_SPATIAL_COMPOSITION_GUIDE.md`.
checks.notes: Vocabulary documented; usage verified across all four lenses.

checks.name: vault_substrate_visually_implied
checks.description: Surface visibly implies substrate hydration via lineage hashes (INVESTIGATION), applied-rule chips (INVESTIGATION), backing-state differentiation (DENSE), and per-mode field gradients — without fake live-binding affordances.
checks.notes: Documented in `VAULT_SUBSTRATE_VISUALIZATION_MODEL.md`. Honest 'binding pending' caption preserved in Report Pack.

checks.name: semantic_actor_redundancy_reduced
checks.description: Compact RepEvidenceState removed from rep field bottoms in prior stream; canonical evidence state lives once in the SupportRail. No actor appears more than once on the surface.
checks.notes: Verified — Report Pack appears once (in SupportRail), evidence state appears once, qualifier state appears once.

checks.name: no_static_html_injection
checks.description: No paragraphs from any static report HTML inlined.
checks.notes: Authored prose preserved; no static report scraping. Lineage hashes drawn from in-memory fixture's `trace_linkage`, not from any HTML.

checks.name: no_fake_runtime_binding
checks.description: Report Pack remains aria-disabled with 'binding pending' caption. No 'live' / 'real-time' / 'loading' affordances. No client / run identifiers in chrome.
checks.notes: Honest binding state preserved across the field transition.

checks.name: no_governance_mutation
checks.description: No changes to docs/governance/, validators, or any governance contract.
checks.notes: git diff confirms changes scoped to docs/psee/PI.LENS.V2.SEMANTIC-FIELD-TRANSITION.01/, docs/pios/PI.LENS.V2.SEMANTIC-FIELD-TRANSITION.01/, and app/execlens-demo/pages/lens-v2-flagship.js.

checks.name: no_evidence_semantic_mutation
checks.description: No changes to evidence semantics, signal interpretation, render-state vocabulary, qualifier-class semantics, propagation logic, or governance ribbon pass/fail logic.
checks.notes: Render-state vocabulary preserved. Qualifier semantics preserved. Orchestration module untouched. Fixture untouched.

checks.name: no_cyberpunk_regression
checks.description: No lens flares, particle effects, neon palettes, holographic shimmer, or 3D transforms.
checks.notes: All atmospheric effects use bounded radial gradients or static concentric rings. No animation. No saturated multi-hue mixes.

checks.name: no_chart_library_aesthetic
checks.description: No use of mix-blend-mode, gradient-border-with-multi-hue-mix, axes / labels / legends in chart sense, or any visual register typical of D3 / Chart.js / Recharts compositions.
checks.notes: Confidence Envelope ring uses CSS conic-gradient — semantic visualization, not a chart-library register.
